programme.desc: Under Nobunaga's orders, Koichiro is told to marry Chika (Yoshioka Riho), the daughter of Morinari. Tokichiro celebrates the match, but troubling rumors surround Chika, and she secretly carries deep resentment toward the Oda clan. Meanwhile, Nobunaga decides to wage war against the Asakura and tells Nagamasa he need only guard the rear, since his son is being held as a hostage in Asakura territory. However, once the battle begins, Nagamasa's father, Hisamasa, pressures him to side with the Asakura

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E71
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: Cloning
programme.desc: Robbie's wardrobe is accidentally converted into a cloning chamber, and he is quick to take advantage of having an army of himself. The new Robbies, however, have different ideas about who should be in charge.

programme.title: Blood Super-Highway
programme.desc: It's milkshake time in the lab as the doctors investigate how blood travels around your body. But will their own ideas for brilliant blood vessel machines impress the minis? And let's find out how being outdoors can improve your mental health.

programme.title: Chan Keng Ian: Cup Stacking King
programme.desc: Chan Keng Ian, a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder and a speed stacking sensation, shares the mental and physical techniques required to achieve the remarkable speed and precision in the popular sport of speed stacking.

programme.title: Space Firsts
programme.desc: A look at the first African-American woman in space and the first spacecraft to reach interstellar space. Host Emily Calandrelli interviews several pioneers of space and discovers the determination and courage required to become the “first.”

programme.title: Blood Super-Highway
programme.desc: It's milkshake time in the lab as the doctors investigate how blood travels around your body. But will their own ideas for brilliant blood vessel machines impress the minis? And let's find out how being outdoors can improve your mental health.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Sneezy Snufflies
programme.desc: When Mrs. Rorschach suddenly develops an allergy, every indictor points to Mr. Tiggles as the cause. Addison has to solve the mystery before Mrs. Rorschach and her kitty are forced to part ways forever!

programme.title: Everybody Loves Leo
programme.desc: Leo feels neglected because of the affection Sprinter is getting from the Bhilkans. Cleopatra takes advantage of the situation and tries to convince Leo that Sprinter doesn't care about her. In reality, Sprinter is planning a surprise party for his best friend!

programme.title: Bom's Big Boom
programme.desc: Hilltown is blossoming with fragrant flowers. Boom has planted all the flowers to cover up his evil plan! He has been hiding stink bombs and now wants to ignite them! Our heroes must find a way, to save the day, and make it possible to breathe peacefully again.

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: Crepes
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula use their imagination to prepare a lot of crepes. They fill them with chocolate, cream, strawberry, and even chicken salad.

programme.title: San Francisco
programme.desc: San Francisco highlights: Sailing under the Golden Gate, House of Air for slacklining and trampoline fun, Pier 39 to meet wild sea lions, and rooftop honey harvesting at Fairmont San Francisco. A week of diverse adventures with Nicole and local teens!

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Bum Noises!
programme.desc: Dr Xand has been recording his farts. But why is it they sound so different? And we meet two of our brilliant new Ouchers!

programme.title: The Word on Problem Solving
programme.desc: Say what?! This episode focuses on the importance of reading math problems very carefully in order to fully understand the problem at hand. Because if you don't answer the right question, how can the solution ever be right?

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia

programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan
programme.desc: Afghanistan has become one of the world's top cricket nations, bringing hope to a country reeling from decades of crisis. The return of the Taliban means this development can only be celebrated by half the population - but Afghan women in exile are using cricket to resist. We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: The Future Of Farming
programme.desc: From agri-influencers to AI in cowsheds and autonomous tractors: Modern technologies are transforming agriculture worldwide. Machines are increasingly handling physically demanding tasks, both in barns and in fields.

programme.title: Polio Remians A Risk In Madagascar
programme.desc: Madagascar struggles to eradicate polio, the failure of the EU's single-use plastic ban, and timeless tradition in a hotel in the Chilean Andes.

programme.title: Santiago De Compostela
programme.desc: The Way of St. James is actually a network of paths made up of several hiking trails across Europe. They all have the city of Santiago de Compostela in Spain as their final destination. We ask pilgrims about their motivation and feelings, find out why Santiago is the destination of the Way of St. James and how the city deals with the flood of pilgrims and hikers in the high season.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: E3 - Rifle vs. Drone
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the ATI Tracking Rifle versus the Sky Jib 8 octocopter; The the Blunt Umbrella versus the Buffalo Turbine Mega Blower; and EverSTIK adhesive versus the Coe M7 tree-shaker.

programme.title: E10

programme.title: E5 - Gentlemen Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: E6 - Home Sweet Jet Truck
programme.desc: The Darnell's celebrate their return home by blowing off some explosive redneck frustration while Brooke tries to keep something very special under wraps.

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: E7 - Dogfight
programme.desc: Mikey shows a veteran Buffalo’s DC-3, WZS, Buffalo’s very own vintage plane from the Second World War. It is being fitted with a special ‘static’ line, which paratroopers will clip onto for a D- Day reenactment jump. But army inspectors tell Mikey a modern military needs a modern line with a winch system in case they need to retrieve a “hung-up jumper”. Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

programme.title: E5 - Gentlemen Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: E6 - Home Sweet Jet Truck
programme.desc: The Darnell's celebrate their return home by blowing off some explosive redneck frustration while Brooke tries to keep something very special under wraps.

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: E7 - Dogfight
programme.desc: Mikey shows a veteran Buffalo’s DC-3, WZS, Buffalo’s very own vintage plane from the Second World War. It is being fitted with a special ‘static’ line, which paratroopers will clip onto for a D- Day reenactment jump. But army inspectors tell Mikey a modern military needs a modern line with a winch system in case they need to retrieve a “hung-up jumper”. Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

programme.title: E3 - Rifle vs. Drone
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the ATI Tracking Rifle versus the Sky Jib 8 octocopter; The the Blunt Umbrella versus the Buffalo Turbine Mega Blower; and EverSTIK adhesive versus the Coe M7 tree-shaker.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: E4 - Staff Training
programme.desc: The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there’s a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai’s food offerings.

Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: E1 - A Family Tradition
programme.desc: Joanna shares a cherished family favorite -- Grandpa Stevens' classic Lebanese dish, fatayer, served with a Lebanese salad, hummus and baklava for dessert.

programme.title: E7 - Bubble Bubble Ears In Trouble
programme.desc: Roger has a considerable growth on his shoulder that he calls his 'second head.' Jenna is a bubbly teenager with an even bigger bubble behind her ear.

programme.title: E1 - A Tough Nut The Case Wise
programme.desc: Chiropractor Dr. Alessandra Colon tackles America's most extreme cases. Through every snap, crack, and pop, she provides extreme pain relief to her patients.

programme.desc: The flowers in Joanna's annual garden are in full bloom as she demonstrates how to make two year-round favorites, her Chocolate Chip Bread and Bacon Cheddar Quiche.

programme.title: Sabhapathy
programme.desc: Sabhaapathy, a man with a speech impairment, desperately looks for a job to earn a living. One day, his life turns upside down as he ends up with a corrupt politician's suitcase filled with money.

programme.title: Hit- The First Case
programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahi
programme.desc: Pooja runs away from home to be with her boyfriend. On her way, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her to her destination, and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: En tête à tête

programme.title: Billet retour

programme.title: E3 - Top of the South/ Te Tau Ihu
programme.desc: Uncover a land of opposites atop New Zealand’s South Island, where one of the world’s longest sandbars attracts bar-tailed godwits and hungry pilot whales, and drowned river valleys provide a buffet for dusky dolphins and New Zealand fur seals.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E5 - Creature Comforts
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a troop of rescue center monkeys that have adopted a litter of stray kittens, a loyal dog helping a rescued raccoon overcome her fears, and an emu raised by Irish setters.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E3 - Top of the South/ Te Tau Ihu
programme.desc: Uncover a land of opposites atop New Zealand’s South Island, where one of the world’s longest sandbars attracts bar-tailed godwits and hungry pilot whales, and drowned river valleys provide a buffet for dusky dolphins and New Zealand fur seals.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E5 - Creature Comforts
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a troop of rescue center monkeys that have adopted a litter of stray kittens, a loyal dog helping a rescued raccoon overcome her fears, and an emu raised by Irish setters.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.desc: Orry Main, a heir to a Southern plantation, and George Hazard, the son of a Pennsylvania industrialist. See how their friendship grows and discovery of the women they will love for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Due to a hypnosis murder case, a former policeman Guo WenBin with hyperthymesia gets involved with a highly intelligent murderer challenging judicial justice. The suspect openly challenges the law and claims to be a vigilante, using bizarre means to eradicate violence. There is panic among the general public, with lives at stake and much doubt floating around. With his extraordinary memory, he works hard to uncover the mystery of this police-versus-criminal game. Hypnotized at the decisive moment, he uses his subconscious to fight against the instigation of his dark side “Suspect Zero”. He uncovers the truth about the murder and the tragedy behind it, curbing the dark side of human nature and upholding judicial justice. While redeeming himself, he also brings the real culprit to justice.

programme.title: Ransomed
programme.desc: In 1987, diplomat 'Min-jun' was unable to escape the Middle East Department at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for five years. One day, he receives a coded message from a missing diplomat in Lebanon, who was kidnapped 20 months ago. Filled with hopeful aspirations of a promotion to the United States if successful, he volunteers for an unofficial mission to rescue his colleague and heads to Lebanon. Upon arrival at the airport, 'Min-jun' narrowly avoids a hail of bullets from airport security guards who are after his life. By chance, he ends up getting into the car of a Korean taxi driver named 'Pan-su'. With local gangsters hot on their heels attempting to steal the ransom money, 'Min-jun' has no choice but to rely on expat Pan-su, the only fellow Korean around. However, can this shady character, who will do anything for money, truly help in rescuing his colleague?

programme.title: Himalaya Singh
programme.desc: Singh is borne and grown up in Himalayas and has reached the ultimate stage in Yoga. He goes to participate the India Beauty's husband-to-be contest. He meets the wanna-be-married Tally. Tally proposed to induce Singh to be a rotten, so India Beauty has a bad husband. Uncle Panic goes traveling to India with his two nephews. Uncle Brave who is one of the tourists has absolutely opposite character. Uncle Panic bumps into several India robbers who hypnotize him and was brought into the Journey Of Illusion by The Peacock...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E260 -Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Guillaume travels to Nature Urbaine, Europe's largest rooftop garden, and uses their produce to make a spring salad; Guillaume catches up with Australian rugby player Kurtley Beale for a meal.

programme.title: E6 - Wales
programme.desc: In Wales, Rick meets the farmer dodging old WWII bombs to raise salt marsh lamb, goes night-fishing on the River Tywi, tries rhubarb pizza and demonstrates how to smoke sea trout.

programme.title: E8 - Hotel Hubertus, Italy - Christmas Special
programme.desc: In the Alpine Tyrol region of Northern Italy lies Hotel Hubertus - a family run resort which offers spectacular views of the surrounding mountains thanks to its extraordinary architecture. Rob and Monica discover the unique Heaven and Hell spa, local ski experiences and are welcomed into the family behind the vision.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The team are in Leicester to help seven-year-old Isla, a bright and determined little girl who dreams of living more independently in her own home.

programme.title: E10 - Dead Wrong
programme.desc: After being pursued by handsome Kevin Lewis, Amanda can't wait to marry her new man. But on their honeymoon, Amanda discovers a different side to Kevin — he likes things done a certain way.

programme.title: E11 - Devastation In Delta Township
programme.desc: Murders are rare in tranquil Delta Township. So when a well-liked couple is gunned down in their home, residents are terrified — until police discover the monster accidentally left a trail of breadcrumbs.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: A simple snack at a local restaurant turns violent when a grandmother is ripped off, but does not give up. A woman takes on the man who slammed into her van and then tries to run.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: E16 - Hoisin Sloppy Janes On Bao Buns
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.title: E24 - Spicy Charred Tomato Pasta With Hot Sausage Or Chickpeas
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: Finale In Blood
programme.desc: An unusual story about an unusual love. Fang Yin comes from countryside to take over and run her father's hotel. She finds herself unable to cope. In distress, she turns to the first man ever to enter her life. It's a big mistake. One night, radio announcer Cheng Ming-pao is saved from drowning by the umbrella. He and she meet and confide in each other. It's Fang Yin's turn to tell Cheng Ming-pao she must leave him and that her ex-lover must pay the debt in kind...

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Shing and Betty want to find money to pay back the loan shark. They break into a house and prepare to steal the valuable items in it. Old Bill, who also owes debts to the loan shark, happens to be in the house. He pretends to be the owner, because he thinks Shing is a wealthy man that he could cheat him for money. Eventually, they find out each other's real identity and cooperate to set plans and trap the loan shark.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: Police officer Jackie is the hero in a police crackdown on drug king Chee. But Chee is set free on lack of evidence while Jackie is demoted. Chee, however, wants Jackie dead....

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: Police officer Jackie is the hero in a police crackdown on drug king Chee. But Chee is set free on lack of evidence while Jackie is demoted. Chee, however, wants Jackie dead....

programme.title: Affectionately Yours
programme.desc: Aran is an honest person. He leads an ordinary life and is quite successful with his business. However, when his girlfriend leaves him, chaos begins. He feels depressed and disheartened. Aran finds his friend Ruddy for comfort. Ruddy's sister Connie has always been interested in Aran so Ruddy and his friend contrive a 'trap' for Aran. Aran is forced to marry Connie. Aran and Connie visit Japan for their honeymoon. It is where Aran learns of the scheme and meets Atsuko who really steals his heart...

programme.title: Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Knowing that Mak, the middle-aged newspaper editor often misses his late spouse, his beloved children persuade him to date Siu Fung, the singer who lives next door. At this moment, Siu Fung's cousin, Uncle Sam, returns from the states and proposes to marry Siu Fung. One day, dispute happens between Sam and Mak which makes Siu Fung so mad with Mak...

programme.title: La Brassiere
programme.desc: Samantha, the president of a renowned brassiere company, breaks the tradition and hires two guys, Johnny and Wayne, as brassiere designers, and requires them to submit novel design in 3 months. Lena, is discontent with this decision deliberately make things difficult for them, those two newcomers to the brassiere industry thus act like buffoon. The time is coming. Can those two guys really work out the 'Ultimate Bra'?

Love Hurts
programme.desc: A seemingly mild-mannered realtor with a dark secret is forced to confront the choices that haunt him and the history he never truly buried.

programme.title: XXX: Return Of Xander Cage
programme.desc: When a group of lethal mercenaries steal a weapon that pose a global threat, superspy Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of adrenaline junkies to save the day.

programme.title: Too Big To Fail
programme.desc: A film on the 2008 Wall Street financial crisis that explores the inner sanctum of the powerful group that decided the fate of the world's economy.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: E307 - Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: E106 - Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E720 - Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: E311 - Dora's Song For Papi / Pirate Piggies
programme.desc: Dora travels across the rainforest, creating a song for her dad so they can celebrate Papi-Dora day!/Dora is ready for the Churro Fiesta when the Pirate Piggies eat all the churros. Dora tracks down a treasure chest of golden churros to save the day!

programme.title: E115 - Truck Rangers
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have joined the Truck Rangers, a scouting club where trucks earn badges for their accomplishments. But when Crusher's selfish scouting lands everyone in a heap of trouble, Blaze must race to the rescue!

programme.title: E206 - The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: E216 - The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: E509 - The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。
